name: Sticky Password
tagline: Best password manager with wildlife conservation mission
description: Sticky Password offers solid password management with a unique conservation mission — a portion of every premium purchase goes to protecting endangered species.
longDescription: Sticky Password has been quietly producing solid password management software for over 20 years, but what truly sets it apart is its mission. A portion of every premium license goes to protecting endangered manatees through a partnership with conservation organizations. Beyond the mission, Sticky Password offers competent password management with AES-256 encryption, cross-platform sync, and a unique local Wi-Fi sync option that keeps your data off the cloud entirely. The interface feels dated compared to modern competitors, and there is no dark web monitoring or advanced sharing features. But for users who want competent protection and want their money to support a good cause, Sticky Password is a compelling choice.

keyFeatures.name: Local Wi-Fi Sync
keyFeatures.description: Sync passwords across devices over your local network without ever sending data to the cloud. Ideal for privacy-conscious users who want cross-device access.

keyFeatures.name: Lifetime License
keyFeatures.description: One-time purchase option for lifetime access. No recurring subscription. Includes all features and updates for the life of the product.

keyFeatures.name: Manatee Conservation
keyFeatures.description: A portion of every premium purchase goes to protecting endangered manatees and their habitats. Partnership with conservation organizations for verified impact.

keyFeatures.name: Portable USB Version
keyFeatures.description: Carry your passwords on a USB drive with a portable version of Sticky Password. Use your passwords on any computer without installing software.

verdict: Sticky Password is the best choice for users who want to support a good cause without sacrificing security. The local Wi-Fi sync option is unique and valuable for privacy-focused users. While the interface and features lag behind market leaders, the core password management is solid and the pricing is very competitive.

faqs.question: How does Sticky Password's Wi-Fi sync work?
faqs.answer: When devices are on the same local network, Sticky Password syncs data directly over Wi-Fi without sending it to any cloud server. Your passwords never leave your local network. This offers an excellent balance of convenience and privacy, though all devices must be on the same network for syncing to occur.

faqs.question: Is the lifetime license worth it?
faqs.answer: For users who dislike subscriptions, the lifetime license ($199.99 one-time) is a good deal. At roughly 5-6 years of equivalent subscription pricing, it pays for itself. However, note that Sticky Password is a smaller company, so long-term viability should be factored into the decision.

author.name: Alex Chen
author.title: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst
author.bio: Alex has tested over 30 password managers across 5 years.

seoMeta.title: Sticky Password Review 2026: 8.0/10 Rating | TrueTopReviews
